purpose: Verify code changes with executable evidence, contract checks, focused regression cases, and explicit risk calibration.
verificationAxes: focused regression covers the changed path
syntax/type/lint gates are run or explicitly unavailable
security, concurrency, async, and resource edge cases are considered
false-positive and false-negative risk is named

blindSpotPatterns.description: Code verifier accepts broad test output without a fixture or reproduction tied to the changed behavior.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Verdict lacks a changed-behavior regression, reproduction command, or clear automation-infeasible reason.

blindSpotPatterns.description: Code verifier relies on static reading and skips runtime, async, concurrency, or failure-path execution where available.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Evidence includes no executable command and no reason runtime verification is unavailable.

repairStrategy: Repair the implementation, tests, or contract in the owning code layer; do not weaken verification criteria.
improveStrategy: Add missing regression fixture, command requirement, edge-case pattern, or parser/schema validation to the verifier harness.

sampleTasks.description: Verify an API bug fix that changes validation behavior and requires a focused failing-before/passing-after test.
mustSelect: focused regression fixture for changed behavior
